colors.name: Black
colors.description: Timeless black frames that add bold contrast and modern sophistication to any artwork. Finished with a matte lacquer coating over solid wood moulding.

colors.name: White
colors.description: Classic white frames that brighten and enhance artwork. Versatile choice for any décor style, from traditional to modern.

colors.name: Walnut
colors.description: Rich walnut tones with deep brown hues. Traditional elegance that complements wood furniture and classic interiors.

colors.name: Oak
colors.description: Natural oak with warm golden-brown tones. Timeless choice that brings organic warmth to any room.

colors.name: Gold
colors.description: Luxurious gold frames with ornate or simple styling. Adds prestige and elegance to fine art, mirrors, and portraits.

colors.name: Silver
colors.description: Sleek silver frames with modern appeal. Constructed from brushed aluminum with a satin-finish clear coat.

colors.name: Bronze
colors.description: Antique bronze with aged patina. Vintage charm that pairs beautifully with traditional and eclectic décor.

colors.name: Espresso
colors.description: Deep espresso brown for sophisticated gallery walls. Professional-grade finish that highlights artwork beautifully.

colors.name: Driftwood
colors.description: Weathered driftwood gray with coastal appeal. Brings relaxed, beachy vibes to farmhouse and cottage interiors.

colors.name: Natural
colors.description: Light natural wood showcasing authentic grain patterns. Scandinavian simplicity for organic, minimalist spaces.

colors.name: Charcoal
colors.description: Dark charcoal gray with subtle texture. Modern alternative to black for contemporary and industrial interiors.

colors.name: Champagne
colors.description: Elegant champagne with pearl shimmer. Sophisticated accent that adds glamour to portraits and formal artwork.

colors.name: Navy
colors.description: Deep navy blue for nautical and coastal themes. Bold color choice that makes artwork pop against dark walls.

colors.name: Sage
colors.description: Soft sage green inspired by nature. Calming botanical choice made from solid wood with a hand-applied matte stain.

colors.name: Ivory
colors.description: Warm ivory with cream undertones. Timeless elegance for vintage photographs and heirloom artwork.
